title: Per-Account Risk Profile Config Schema with Multi-Tier Presets
summary: Define a structured RiskProfile dataclass that encodes all risk parameters in one place: kelly_fraction (0.25 default), target_ann_vol (0.12), max_portfolio_heat (0.05), max_sector_concentration (0.30), max_single_position_pct (0.10), drawdown_tier1/2/halt thresholds, cvar_budget, and correlation_block_threshold. Ship three preset profiles: Conservative (friends/family, low risk tolerance), Moderate (default), and Aggressive (founder account). This is the foundational config layer that makes all the other risk features per-user-configurable — directly enabling the Per-Account Config Profiles and Per-Account Risk Limits backlog items.
deferral_reason: Multi-account, future stage — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
